title: rhododendron obtusum var. mikawanum
intro: Rhododendron obtusum var. mikawanum, also known as Mikawa rhododendron, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family that is native to Japan. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and skin irritations, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Mikawa rhododendron can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, with leaves typically used for medicinal purposes.
